title: Assigning a task (floating task) to someone without any corresponding board/project
excerpt:
Hi… 
Quick question… is it possible to assign my team member a task without the task being in any board/project? So essentially it’s an independent/floating task that has no corresponding board. Or do I need to create a …

posts.author: vaans (Antonius Taufan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi…

Quick question… is it possible to assign my team member a task without the task being in any board/project? So essentially it’s an independent/floating task that has no corresponding board. Or do I need to create a board first, then create the task for him/her?

Thanks

posts.author: jennap (Jenna)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @vaans ~ Welcome to the Community!

It is not possible to assign someone to a task if that task doesn’t yet exist. In order for a task to exist to assign to someone, you will need to create an item within an existing board and then assign people accordingly.

I hope this helps! Remember to mark as solved if this answers your question

Cheers,
Jenna
